overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian cyberpunk city street at night, featuring prominent neon lighting, wet reflective asphalt, and futuristic architecture. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character walking past an Arasaka billboard and through a security checkpoint intersection.

events.description: futuristic vehicle passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath a large illuminated Arasaka billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate billboard displaying 'ARASAKA' with soldier imagery, spanning across the street
tall industrial wall with continuous horizontal yellow neon lighting and Japanese characters
elevated roadway barrier with green neon strip lighting and red triangular warning lights
dark industrial smoke rising against the night sky from distant stacks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, dominated by a massive overhead Arasaka billboard. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, flanked by a yellow-lit industrial wall on the right and a green neon barrier on the left. A vehicle passes on the street as smoke rises in the distance.

events.description: passing under and beyond the Arasaka billboard, revealing more of the street ahead
pedestrian walks past the camera from behind, moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk as the environment opens up, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored clothing overtakes the camera and continues walking ahead

entered.detail: elevated security checkpoint tower with illuminated windows and observation deck
green street sign displaying 'Guerra' in white text

segments.scene_description: Having passed the Arasaka billboard, the street opens slightly to reveal a security checkpoint ahead. A pedestrian overtakes the camera on the sidewalk. The guard tower and street signage become visible as the camera approaches the intersection, with the yellow neon wall continuing along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint intersection with corporate tower view

events.description: turning at the Guerra street intersection, revealing the guard tower and wider cityscape
futuristic vehicle with glowing red taillights passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, turning slightly to follow the sidewalk past the security checkpoint

entered.detail: massive distinctive skyscraper with illuminated X-shaped structural pattern on its facade
road sign displaying 'SPEED LIMIT 40' in white text on dark background

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the Guerra street intersection, passing the illuminated guard tower on the left. The view opens up to reveal a massive corporate skyscraper with a distinctive X-patterned facade in the distance. Vehicles continue to pass on the wet street as the yellow neon wall extends along the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that transitions from a narrow, billboard-dominated corridor into a wide corporate intersection. It begins on a sidewalk flanked by a yellow-lit industrial wall and a green neon barrier, moving beneath a massive overhead Arasaka billboard as smoke rises in the distance. As the camera passes the billboard, the street opens slightly to reveal a security checkpoint and a guard tower ahead, while a pedestrian overtakes the viewer on the wet pavement. The scene then expands as the camera moves through the Guerra street intersection, passing the illuminated tower on the left. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal a massive corporate skyscraper with a distinctive X-patterned facade looming in the distance under the glow of the city lights.
